name: Venture Global, Inc.
business: Venture Global is a long-term, low-cost provider of U.S. LNG sourced from resource rich North American natural gas basins. LNG is sold to customers on either a FOB, DPU or DES basis, directly from projects or through a sales and shipping business.
sellsTo: premium markets with no or limited LNG transportation options

exposures.sentence: Venture Global is a long-term, low-cost provider of U.S. LNG sourced from resource rich North American natural gas basins.

We plan to deploy carbon capture and sequestration systems adjacent to our Louisiana projects to reduce CO emissions by compressing CO2 emissions from our projects and injecting them into subsurface saline aquifers near our project site.
To further vertically integrate our business and expand access to premium markets that have no or limited LNG transportation options, we are building a fleet of LNG tankers.

catalysts.sentence: Construction of the Calcasieu Project is complete, and the facility achieved COD on April 15, 2025.
Anticipated project timeline: Targeted COD Q4 2026 Mid-2027
Anticipated project timeline: Targeted COD Q4 2026 Mid-2027
Anticipated project timeline: Final investment decision / financial closing July 28, 2025 Mid-2026 Targeted COD Late-2029 Mid-2030
Anticipated project timeline: Final investment decision / financial closing July 28, 2025 Mid-2026 Targeted COD Late-2029 Mid-2030

catalysts.event: Plaquemines Expansion Project targeted start of construction
catalysts.sentence: We expect to begin construction of the Plaquemines Expansion Project upon receipt of all required regulatory approvals and are targeting the start of construction by the second half of 2027.

catalysts.event: CP2 Expansion Project targeted start of construction
catalysts.sentence: We expect to begin construction of the CP2 Expansion Project upon receipt of all required regulatory approvals and are targeting the start of construction by the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: FERC application to increase Plaquemines permitted capacity
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we filed an application with the FERC to increase the permitted production capacity of the Plaquemines Project from 27.2 mtpa to 35.0 mtpa.

catalysts.event: FERC and DOE applications for Plaquemines Expansion Project
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we filed applications with the FERC and DOE proposing a 31.0 mtpa expansion of the Plaquemines Project (the Plaquemines Expansion Project).

catalysts.event: DOE application to increase CP2 export volumes
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we submitted an application with the DOE to increase our authorized export volumes to FTA and non-FTA nations 35.0 mtpa.

catalysts.event: Intended FERC and DOE applications for CP2 Expansion Project
catalysts.sentence: We intend to file applications with the FERC and DOE proposing a 11.7 mtpa expansion of the CP2 Project (the "CP2 Expansion Project") in the first half of 2026.
